chain_of_thought: As a robotic planning expert: I must sequentially move all three colored blocks to the top left corner.
As a robotic planning expert: 'The yellow one' means yellow block, 'the green thing' means green bowl. I will place the yellow block on the green bowl.
As a robotic planning expert: Yellow is the lightest color among the available blocks. I will move it to the middle position.
As a robotic planning expert: Stacking requires sequential placement. I will place green on blue, then red on green.
As a robotic planning expert: I must identify all blue-colored objects and group them by moving the blue block into the blue bowl.
As a robotic planning expert: A color-matching sort requires each block to be placed in its same-color bowl. I will execute three placements.
As a robotic planning expert: With four blocks and four distinct corners, I will systematically assign one block per corner.
